mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM TB_MAP_MEMBER_CHNL_TRACK WHERE member_chnl_id = #{channelId} AND track_id IN
#{trackId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(MMCT.member_chnl_id) FROM tb_map_member_chnl_track MMCT WHERE member_chnl_id = #{channelId}

SELECT IFNULL(MAX(TRACK_SN), 0) AS TRACK_SN FROM TB_MAP_MEMBER_CHNL_TRACK
AND MEMBER_CHNL_ID = #{channelId}
